name: Applesauce-Ham Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the pancake or waffle flour, brown sugar, and cinnamon.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg yolks and milk until smooth.
3. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring just until combined.
4. Cook the ground ham in a pan until it is nearly cooked through.
5. Add the cooked ham, applesauce, and melted butter to the batter, stirring to combine.
6. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites with a spatula or whisk.
7. Pour the batter into a hot waffle iron and cook until golden brown.
8. Serve warm. Makes 6 waffles.
